ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no
,( select coalesce(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '01' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as insurance_amount /*ค่าประกันอัคคีภัย*/
,( select coalesce(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '02' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as loan_amount /*ค่าประกันสินเชื่อ*/
,( select coalesce(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '03' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as app_land_amount /*ค่าประเมินที่ดิน*/
,( select coalesce(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '04','05','06' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as cks_amount /*หักเงิน ชคส*/
,( select coalesce(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '07' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as crem_amount /*หักเงิน สมาคมฌาปนกิจ*/
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd month')||' '||'พ.ศ.'||to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'yyyy') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
, (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status WHEN '1' THEN sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first ELSE 0 END) as c_interest_first , coalesce((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.ref_item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id not in ( 'PL' , 'SL' ) and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.system in ('insurance') and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ),0) as item_amount_fee , coalesce((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.ref_item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id not in ( 'PL' , 'SL' ) and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.system not in ('insurance') and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ),0) as item_amount_oth , coalesce((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'SL' and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ),0) as item_amount_sl ,sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_id FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '22/04/2020' order by FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no

r_ktm_app_by_conno_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code, ( case collateral_type_code when '01' then PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) when '02' then 'กู้ไม่เกินหุ้นที่ชำระแล้ว' when '03' then 'เงินฝากเลขที่ '||ref_own_no else 'ที่ดินเลขที่ '||collateral_description end) as case_collateral_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )

r_ktm_loan_paid_cash_nest_loan_old_conno.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ,(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount - (select (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status WHEN '1' THEN sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first ELSE 0 END) from sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description))as interest_amount_no FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' )
